response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java-focused project work, has only basic German language proficiency (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level titles inconsistent with an entry-level role, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and team integration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the required fluency
No demonstrated Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Senior-level employment history contradicts entry-level role expectations
